examples: Stop smoking and munch right to help your body stay at a healthy weight.
Stephan Munch and Santiago Salinas were intrigued by a major difference in the lifespans of two populations of pearl mussels.
We eat while watching TV, we munch on something at our desk at work, we crunch on something while driving and drink something while reading or waiting.
The Colombians munch on dangerously strange hot dogs blanketed in French fries and mashed potatoes.
Trendy patrons happily queue for up to 45 minutes to munch on dishes from tacos to ice cream.
